name: Mushrooms with Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mushrooms and cut them into thin slices.
2. Cut the onion into slices as well.
3. Fry the onion and garlic in vegetable oil until the onion is transparent.
4. Add the mushrooms, epazote, salt, and pepper to the pan.
5. Cook until all the water has evaporated.
Serve as a side dish or a main dish with tortillas as tacos or make a quesadilla by adding cheese (mozzarella).
